meta.title: Nail Salon POS & Management Software | D3
meta.description: All-in-one nail salon POS, online booking, payroll and self check-in kiosk. Book a free demo or call (919) 655-3989.

hero.badge: All Salon Solutions in One Place
hero.lead: One platform that runs your front desk, online booking, payroll, payments and self check-in kiosk — so you can run the salon, not the software.
hero.glassBadge: Check-in to checkout in one system

proof.heading: Trusted by nail salons across the US

ecosystem.h2: A Complete Salon Management Software Ecosystem
ecosystem.lead: Every tool talks to the same system — book online, check in at the kiosk, ring up at the POS, and payroll updates itself.

pos.name: D3 Salon POS
pos.desc: Fast checkout, ticket management, turn tracking and end-of-day reports — the command center your front desk runs all day.

booking.name: Online Booking
booking.desc: Clients book 24/7 with capacity-aware timeslots and automatic text reminders.

owner.name: Owner App
owner.desc: Revenue, payroll and schedules in your pocket. Run the salon from anywhere.

tech.name: Technician App
tech.desc: Technicians see their schedule, turns and payouts in real time.

kiosk.name: Quick Check-In Kiosk
kiosk.desc: iPad self check-in with phone lookup, QR code and instant ticket printing.

portal.name: Technician Portal
portal.desc: A web portal for technicians to review hours, payouts and ticket history.

features.h2: The Features That Run Your Day

booking.h3: Fill your book while you sleep
booking.p: Your booking page stays open 24/7 and syncs straight to the schedule, with text reminders that cut no-shows.

payroll.h3: Payroll that does the math for you
payroll.p: W2/1099 setup, tip reimbursement and turn-based splits calculated as tickets close — not in a spreadsheet on Sunday night.

checkin.h3: A front desk that never gets a line
checkin.p: Walk-ins check themselves in on the iPad or by QR code — and a service ticket prints before they sit down.

payments.p: Terminals link directly to the POS — payment details save to the ticket automatically, tips split correctly every time.

personas.h2: Owners, Technicians and Clients All Win

owners.title: For Owners
items: Real-time revenue from your phone
Payroll calculated automatically
Manage multiple locations remotely

techs.title: For Technicians
items: See schedule and turns in the app
Transparent payouts, no surprises
Clients can request you by name

clients.title: For Clients
items: Book online any time, any device
Self check-in in under 20 seconds
Their favorite tech, every visit

items.q: What hardware do I need to run D3?
items.a: A computer or tablet for the POS, an iPad for the check-in kiosk, and a receipt printer. We'll recommend exact models during your demo.
Yes. Clients book from your website or a link you share, and appointments sync to your schedule automatically — with text reminders included.
D3 calculates technician payouts as tickets close — W2 or 1099, tips, turn splits and salon fees included. Daily payroll is ready at end of day.

items.q: Will you migrate my data from my current POS?
items.a: Yes. We migrate your clients, services and gift card balances as part of free onboarding.
No. D3 is month-to-month. We earn your business every month — that's why salons stay.

demo.h2: See D3 Running Your Salon — in 20 Minutes
demo.p: Book a free demo and we'll walk through your salon's exact workflow: check-in, booking, checkout and payroll. No pressure, no contract.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Current POS, number of locations, what you want to improve…
form.note: We'll reach out within one business day. No spam, ever.
form.successBody: Your demo request is in. A D3 specialist will call you within one business day. Prefer to talk now? Call (919) 655-3989.
form.errorBody: Something went wrong sending your request. Please call (919) 655-3989 and we'll get you set up.

meta.title: Salon POS Software for Nail Salons | D3
meta.description: Nail salon point of sale software with turn tracking, one-step checkout, integrated payments and end-of-day reports. Book a free demo.

salonPos.h1: Salon Point of Sale Software Built for Nail Salons
salonPos.lead: Fast checkout, turn tracking, integrated payments and end-of-day reports — the command center your front desk runs all day.

benefits.h3: One-step checkout with zero double entry
benefits.p: Payment terminals link straight to the POS, so card details and tips save to the ticket automatically — no re-keying, no mismatched totals at close.
items: Integrated card terminal, payment saved to the ticket
Automatic tip entry and correct tip splitting
One-step checkout with automatic data entry

benefits.h3: Turn tracking the way your salon actually runs
benefits.p: First Come First Serve, by total amount, by service type or by number of turns — pick the rule your salon uses and D3 keeps the rotation fair automatically.
items: Four turn methods: FCFS, total amount, service type, number of turns
Requested-technician handling built in
Turns flow straight into payroll

benefits.h3: Automatic till close and clean reports
benefits.p: Close the day in minutes with automatic till close, daily sales and a payroll snapshot — so you leave the salon knowing your numbers.
items: Automatic till close at end of day
Daily sales, service and technician reports
Gift card and loyalty balances in the same POS

faq.q: Can I use my own payment processor?
faq.a: We'll cover payment options during your demo and recommend the best fit for your salon. Terminals integrate directly with the POS either way.

faq.q: How many technicians and tickets can I have?
faq.a: Unlimited on every plan. Pricing scales by location, not by team size.

faq.q: Does it handle gift cards and loyalty?
faq.a: Yes — gift cards and the loyalty program live in the same POS and apply automatically at checkout.

meta.title: Online Booking Software for Nail Salons | D3
meta.description: 24/7 nail salon booking software with capacity-aware timeslots, text reminders and schedule sync. Cut no-shows. Book a free demo.

onlineBooking.h1: Online Booking Software That Fills Your Nail Salon
onlineBooking.lead: Your booking page stays open 24/7, syncs straight to the schedule, and sends text reminders that cut no-shows.

benefits.h3: Fill your book while you sleep
benefits.p: Clients book any time from your website or a shared link. Capacity-aware timeslots mean you only ever take appointments you can actually staff.
items: 24/7 booking from your website or a share link
Capacity-aware timeslots, no double-booking
Clients pick their favorite technician by name

benefits.h3: Text reminders that bring clients back
benefits.p: Automatic text reminders and confirmations keep chairs full, and booked clients check in even faster at the kiosk.
items: Automatic text confirmations and reminders
Loyalty and promotions by text
Booked clients flow straight into check-in

benefits.h3: Bookings land on the schedule automatically
benefits.p: Every online appointment syncs to the same schedule your front desk and technicians already use — no second calendar to manage.
items: Real-time sync to the salon schedule
Visible in the Owner and Technician apps
Turns and payroll update as bookings are served

faq.a: From your own website, a link you share on social media, or a QR code in the salon. The booking page is yours and matches your salon.
Yes. Timeslots are capacity-aware, so clients can only book times you can actually staff.
Yes — automatic text confirmations and reminders are included, which is the single biggest lever on no-shows.

meta.title: Nail Salon Check-In App & iPad Kiosk | D3
meta.description: Self check-in app for nail salons. iPad kiosk, phone lookup, QR code and instant ticket printing. Ends front-desk lines. Book a demo.

checkIn.h1: The Nail Salon Check-In App That Ends Front-Desk Lines
checkIn.lead: Clients check themselves in on an iPad or by QR code. A service ticket prints instantly. Your front desk gets its time back.

benefits.p: Returning clients are recognized by phone number. New clients are added on the spot — no clipboard, no waiting for the front desk.
items: Phone number lookup with returning-client recognition
Optional service and preferred-technician selection
Contactless QR code check-in from the client's own phone

benefits.h3: Tickets print before they sit down
benefits.p: Every check-in prints a service ticket straight to your front desk printer, so technicians know who's next and what they booked.
items: Instant printing over your salon network
Retry and print history if a printer hiccups
Check-ins flow into turn tracking automatically

benefits.p: Check-in connects to the loyalty program — clients collect points and receive personalized promotions by text, with zero extra work at the desk.
items: Points tracked per client, redeemed at checkout
Personalized promotion texts to bring clients back
Works with gift cards in the same POS

faq.q: What device does the kiosk run on?
faq.a: An iPad at your front desk. We help you configure the printer and stand during onboarding.

faq.q: Can clients skip choosing a service?
faq.a: Yes — service and technician selection are optional. A client can check in with just their phone number.

faq.q: What happens if the printer fails?
faq.a: The kiosk offers a retry, a printer settings check, and a failed-print history so no ticket is ever lost.

meta.title: Salon Payroll Software — W2 & 1099 | D3
meta.description: Nail salon payroll software with W2/1099 setup, turn-based splits, tip reimbursement and daily payroll. Done as tickets close. Book a demo.

payroll.h1: Salon Payroll Software for W2 & 1099 Technicians
payroll.lead: Turn-based splits, tip reimbursement and daily payroll calculated as tickets close — not in a spreadsheet on Sunday night.

benefits.h3: Set up each technician the right way
benefits.p: Configure W2 or 1099, commission rates, hourly, and salon fees per technician — D3 applies the right math to every ticket automatically.
items: Per-technician W2 or 1099 setup
Commission, hourly and salon-fee rules
Tip reimbursement handled correctly

benefits.h3: Payouts that follow your turn rules
benefits.p: Whichever turn method your salon uses, payouts are split automatically as tickets close — fair, transparent and visible to technicians in their app.
items: Splits follow your turn method automatically
Technicians see payouts in real time in the app
No end-of-week spreadsheet reconciliation

benefits.h3: Payroll ready at end of day
benefits.p: A payroll snapshot is ready every day with automatic till close — so you always know what each technician earned before you walk out.
items: Daily payroll snapshot with automatic till close
Per-technician hours, turns and payout history
Export-ready summaries for your accountant

faq.q: Does D3 support both W2 and 1099?
faq.a: Yes. Each technician can be set up as W2 or 1099 with their own commission, hourly and fee rules.
Tips are captured at checkout and reimbursed to the right technician automatically, with tip splitting where your salon uses it.

faq.q: Can my accountant get the numbers?
faq.a: Yes — daily and period payroll summaries are export-ready so your bookkeeper or accountant has clean figures.

meta.title: Pricing — Nail Salon POS Plans | D3
meta.description: Simple nail salon software pricing. Basic $49.95/mo and Premium $99.95/mo. Month-to-month, no contract, free setup. Book a demo.

pricing.lead: Two plans, everything included, no contract. Month-to-month with free setup and data migration.

basic.name: Basic
basic.blurb: Everything a salon needs to ring up and run the front desk.

premium.name: Premium
premium.blurb: The full ecosystem — kiosk, apps, booking and loyalty.

pricing.footnote: Both plans are month-to-month with no contract and free onboarding. Hardware is quoted separately based on what your salon already has.

items.a: Setup, data migration and onboarding are free. Hardware is quoted separately based on what your salon already has.
No — both plans are month-to-month. Cancel anytime.

items.q: Does the price change with more technicians?
items.a: No. Technicians and tickets are unlimited. Pricing is per plan, per location — not by team size.

meta.title: About D3 Salon Solution — Raleigh, NC
meta.description: D3 builds salons and the software to run them. Based in Raleigh, NC, serving nail salons across the US. Book a free demo.

about.h1: We Build Salons. Then We Built the Software to Run Them.
about.lead: All salon solutions in one place — from Raleigh, North Carolina to salons across the US.
about.storyH2: Software designed on the salon floor, not in a boardroom
about.storyP1: D3 started by building salons themselves — custom furniture, pedicure chairs, full build-outs. Years of working inside real nail salons showed us exactly where the day gets stuck: the front-desk line at 2 PM, the payroll spreadsheet on Sunday night, the no-show that left a chair empty.
about.storyP2: So we built the software we wished every salon we furnished already had. Every feature in D3 — turn tracking, self check-in, W2/1099 payroll — exists because a working salon needed it.
about.hqNote: Headquarters: Raleigh, North Carolina — visit our showroom or meet us at the next nail industry show.

cta.h2: Talk to people who know salons
cta.p: Our team has stood at the front desk. Let's walk through yours.
